news.summary: Berlin's Eta becomes first female head coach of a top-tier European club after her appointment by the Bundesliga side.

news.headline: Polls open in Hungary crunch vote
news.summary: Hungarians began voting on Sunday in closely watched parliamentary elections that could end nationalist Prime Minister Viktor Orban's 16-year stint in power as a self-described "thorn" in the EU's side. France 24 correspondent Clovis Casali reports the latest from Budapest.
